name: PII Detection
description: Detects personally identifiable information such as email addresses, phone numbers, SSNs, credit card numbers, and IP addresses using regex patterns.

name: Prompt Injection Guard
description: Detects prompt injection attempts using pattern matching and optional LLM verification. Catches common injection techniques like role overrides, instruction ignoring, and system prompt extraction.

name: Toxicity Filter
description: Uses LLM-based analysis to detect toxic, offensive, harassing, or inappropriate content in both input and output.

name: Hallucination Detection
description: Uses LLM-based analysis to detect when the model generates information not grounded in the provided context or known facts.

name: Topic Guard
description: Uses LLM-based analysis to ensure the conversation stays within allowed topics and does not veer into restricted areas.

name: Code Execution Guard
description: Detects potentially dangerous code execution patterns such as system commands, file operations, network calls, and eval statements using regex.

name: Length Guard
description: Enforces minimum and maximum length constraints on input and output to prevent abuse and ensure quality.

name: Custom Policy Guard
description: User-defined guardrail that uses a custom LLM prompt to enforce organization-specific policies and rules.
